title: Old Cows
description: A resource pack that brings back the old cows and gets rid of the new breeds! basically a resource pack for anyone who doesn't like/want the new cows but still want to play on the newest version! (BEWARE: there are some defects)
body:
A resource pack that brings back the old cows and gets rid of the new variants! basically a resource pack for anyone who doesn't like/want the new cows but still want to play on the newest version!

**Known issues: since the new varients use different models, the orignal cow texture does not fit the two new models, therefore i had to "stitch" some points up. (AKA the cosmetics on the two new breeds on the head are still there, just retextured.)**

### Example:
![ExampleOfPack.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcffb443ceb2cd16eda6cc8ceab68ac1a940d920.gif)
